package rulecoverage

func NegativeRawSqlLiteralInHandler() string {
    ruleID := "raw_sql_literal_in_handler"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Literal SQL strings declared and executed from handlers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
